mapper.sql: id, booking_no, venue_id, venue_name, people_count, user_id, user_name, booking_date, start_time, end_time, hours, rental_price, total_amount, status, payment_status, payment_time, payment_method, cancel_reason, cancel_time, remark, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT vb.id, vb.booking_no, vb.venue_id, vb.venue_name, vb.people_count, vb.user_id, vb.user_name, vb.booking_date, vb.start_time, vb.end_time, vb.hours, vb.rental_price, vb.total_amount, vb.status, vb.payment_status, vb.payment_time, vb.payment_method, vb.cancel_reason, vb.cancel_time, vb.remark, vb.create_time, vb.update_time, vb.is_deleted, v.venue_type as venue_type, v.difficulty_level as venue_difficulty, v.image_url as venue_image, v.max_capacity as venue_capacity FROM t_venue_booking vb LEFT JOIN t_venue v ON vb.venue_id = v.id AND v.is_deleted = 0 WHERE vb.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY vb.create_time DESC

SELECT vb.id, vb.booking_no, vb.venue_id, vb.venue_name, vb.people_count, vb.user_id, vb.user_name, vb.booking_date, vb.start_time, vb.end_time, vb.hours, vb.rental_price, vb.total_amount, vb.status, vb.payment_status, vb.payment_time, vb.payment_method, vb.cancel_reason, vb.cancel_time, vb.remark, vb.create_time, vb.update_time, vb.is_deleted, v.venue_type as venue_type, v.difficulty_level as venue_difficulty, v.image_url as venue_image, v.max_capacity as venue_capacity FROM t_venue_booking vb LEFT JOIN t_venue v ON vb.venue_id = v.id AND v.is_deleted = 0 WHERE vb.id = #{id} AND vb.is_deleted = 0

SELECT vb.id, vb.booking_no, vb.venue_id, vb.venue_name, vb.user_id, vb.user_name, vb.booking_date, vb.start_time, vb.end_time, vb.hours, vb.rental_price, vb.total_amount, vb.status, vb.payment_status, vb.payment_time, vb.payment_method, vb.cancel_reason, vb.cancel_time, vb.remark, vb.create_time, vb.update_time, vb.is_deleted, vb.people_count, v.venue_type as venue_type, v.image_url as venue_image, v.description as venue_description, v.difficulty_level as venue_difficulty, v.max_capacity as venue_capacity FROM t_venue_booking vb LEFT JOIN t_venue v ON vb.venue_id = v.id AND v.is_deleted = 0 WHERE vb.user_id = #{userId} AND vb.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY vb.create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_venue_booking WHERE venue_id = #{venueId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_venue_booking SET booking_date = #{bookingDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, hours = #{hours}, people_count = #{peopleCount}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, status = #{status}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_venue_booking SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_venue_booking SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
